info.title: Kling Text-to-Video Task - Submit Task (kling-v2-1-master)
info.description: Submit a Kling text-to-video task via `/kling/v1/videos/text2video`. Uses model kling-v2-1-master.

post.description: Submit a Kling text-to-video task via `/kling/v1/videos/text2video`. The request body is forwarded to the Kling official API after model mapping and public task ID injection.

value.prompt: A cinematic shot of clouds moving over a mountain ridge

400.description: Invalid request or rejected by upstream.

bearerAuth.description: Pass `Authorization: Bearer <token>` in the request header.

multi_shot.description:
Whether to generate a multi-shot video.
When this parameter is true, the prompt parameter is invalid and first/last frame video generation is not supported.
When this parameter is false, the shot_type and multi_prompt parameters are invalid.

shot_type.description:
Shot type
Required when multi_shot is true.

prompt.description:
Positive text prompt

```markdown
Omni models can achieve various capabilities through prompts with subjects, images, videos, etc.:
- Use <<<>>> format to specify a subject, image, or video, e.g.: <<<element_1>>>, <<<image_1>>>, <<<video_1>>>
```

- Use <<<voice_1>>> to specify a voice, index matching voice_list; up to 2 voices; sound must be 'on' when specifying voices; keep syntax simple, e.g.: A man<<<voice_1>>>says: "Hello"
- When voice_list is not empty and prompt references a voice ID, billing is based on 'with specified voice'
- Must not be empty when multi_shot is false or shot_type is intelligence.

multi_prompt.description:
Multi-shot information including prompt, duration, etc.
Define shot index and corresponding prompt and duration via index, prompt, duration parameters.
- Max 6 shots, min 1 shot.
- Max length per shot content: 512 characters.
- Each shot duration must not exceed total task duration and must be >= 1.
- Sum of all shot durations must equal total task duration.

Required when multi_shot is true and shot_type is customize. Format:

```json
"multi_prompt":[{ "index": int, "prompt": "string", "duration": "5" },{ "index": int, "prompt": "string","duration": "5" }]
```

Required when multi_shot is true and shot_type is customize.

negative_prompt.description:
Negative text prompt
- Max 2500 characters
- Supplement negative prompt information through negative sentences in the positive prompt

sound.description: Whether to also generate audio when creating the video

cfg_scale.description:
Creative freedom of video generation; higher values result in less creative freedom
kling-v2.x models do not support this parameter

mode.description:
Video generation mode

- std: Standard mode, cost-effective, output video resolution 720P.
- pro: Expert mode (high quality), better video quality, output video resolution 1080P.
- 4k: 4K mode, high quality (same as pro), better video quality, output video resolution 4K.

camera_control.description: Camera motion control settings (if not specified, the model will intelligently match based on input text/image)

type.description:
Predefined camera motion types.
- simple: Simple camera movement, choose one of six config options.
- down_back: Camera tilts down and moves back ➡️ pull away, no config needed.
- forward_up: Camera moves forward and tilts up ➡️ push in and up, no config needed.
- right_turn_forward: Rotate right then move forward ➡️ right spin push, no config needed.
- left_turn_forward: Rotate left and move forward ➡️ left spin push, no config needed.

config.description:
Contains 6 fields to specify camera movement in different directions
- Required when camera type is 'simple', leave empty for other types
- Choose exactly 1 of the 6 parameters to be non-zero, the rest must be 0

horizontal.description:
Horizontal movement along the X-axis
Negative values move left, positive values move right

vertical.description:
Vertical movement along the Y-axis
Negative values move down, positive values move up

pan.description:
Pan: rotation around the Y-axis
Negative values rotate left, positive values rotate right

tilt.description:
Tilt: rotation around the X-axis
Negative values tilt down, positive values tilt up

roll.description:
Roll: rotation around the Z-axis
Negative values rotate counter-clockwise, positive values rotate clockwise

zoom.description:
Zoom: controls focal length and field of view
Negative values zoom in (narrower FOV), positive values zoom out (wider FOV)

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of generated video frames (width:height)

watermark_info.description: Whether to also generate a watermarked result.

enabled.description: true to generate watermarked result, false to not generate.

callback_url.description: Callback notification URL for this task. If configured, the server will proactively notify when the task status changes.

error.description: Error details returned by the gateway or upstream provider.

code.description: Kling response code. 0 indicates the task has been accepted.

task_id.description: Public task ID generated by this gateway. The upstream task ID is not exposed.

external_task_id.description: External task ID provided by the client, or the public task ID injected by the gateway.
